task: R68 Exposure triangle semi-auto linkage closure

implemented: Removed UI-level ISO lock caused by manual Shutter
Removed UI-level Shutter lock caused by manual ISO
Removed runtime guard that blocked ISO writes while Shutter was manual
Removed runtime guard that blocked manual Shutter writes while ISO was manual
Kept EV locked when ISO or Shutter is manual
Kept R66 custom exposure clamp protection
Added Debug-only exposure triangle logs for ISO/Shutter actions

r67_overlock_cause: CaptureScreen derived isoBlockedByShutter and shutterBlockedByISO, then used them to mark ISO or Shutter as locked.
CaptureLivePreviewView rejected ISO writes when Shutter was not Auto and rejected manual Shutter writes when ISO was not Auto.

ev_lock.ui: EV displays LOCK and does not open the ruler

events: ev blocked events retained from R67

risks: AVFoundation custom exposure writes accept both duration and ISO together, so true independent semi-auto behavior may still be constrained by hardware/runtime behavior.
True-device validation is required to confirm that the user-facing ISO/S semi-auto controls match observed exposure behavior.
